basic.title: Free
basic.description: Perfect to start your online store.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about our plans.

items.label: Do you really not charge commissions?
items.content: Correct. DeComer does not charge any sales commission. You only pay the monthly or yearly subscription and keep 100% of your sales.

items.label: Can I start for free?
items.content: Yes, the Free plan lets you create a store with up to 100 products at no cost. No credit card, no time limit.

items.label: What payment methods do my customers have?
items.content: We integrate with MercadoPago, allowing credit cards, debit cards, transfers and cash payments.

items.label: Can I change plans later?
items.content: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes apply immediately.

items.label: What if I exceed the product limit?
items.content: We will notify you and you can upgrade or remove products. We never delete products without your consent.

items.label: Do you offer support?
items.content: Yes, all plans include email support. Pro and Business plans have priority support.
